market_context: X sentiment shows cautious bearishness with rising VIX mentions and tech selloff chatter dominating feeds. Pre-market futures point to a flat-to-down open amid 10Y yield at 4.66%. No major catalysts expected but options flow signals defensive positioning.

predictions.reasoning: VIX up 8.6% on 5-day and X chatter highlights risk-off flows; 10Y yield pressure likely caps upside into close.
Tech names under pressure per recent 5-day -1.7% move; X volume on NVDA and MSFT negative outweighs any crypto tailwinds.
Short interest signals and X options flow point to continued profit-taking after recent highs.
Crypto positive sentiment on X may lift TSLA as correlated asset despite broader market weakness.
